text.title: ruby-activerecord Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for ruby-activerecord as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Putting WHERE logic directly in controller actions (Users.where(active: true).where(role: 'admin').where(...)).
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Query logic scattered in controllers is not reusable, hard to test, and couples the controller to the schema. Later, multiple actions need the same filter and the code gets duplicated or moved to a helper (which is worse).
